context_state.divergence_note: Responds to transport decision from interface-verification-ack-001.json. CF Tunnel is live.

payload.subject: CF Tunnel live — PSQ endpoint publicly accessible, Phase 4 smoke test unblocked

tunnel.health_check: GET /health → {status: ok, model: psq-student, calibration_version: isotonic-v1-2026-03-06, ready: true}
tunnel.note: URL is ephemeral — valid while cloudflared process on Debian is running. Will change if restarted.

integration_instruction.then: wrangler dev — POST /psq/score should route through CF Worker → tunnel → Debian PSQ endpoint → machine-response/v3 response

smoke_test_checklist: GET /psq/health through wrangler dev → expect {status: ok, ready: true}
POST /psq/score with test text → expect v3 response with psq_composite, dimensions[10], hierarchy
Verify psq.js renders radar chart + score rows
Verify hierarchy panel: factors_2/3/5 + g_psq scalar
Verify threshold indicators (hollow dots where confidence < 0.6)
Verify artifact indicator (dotted underline where |raw - calibrated| > 0.5)

claims.text: CF Tunnel URL https://coordinates-valve-conventions-convertible.trycloudflare.com is live, health-checked, and routes to PSQ scoring endpoint
claims.confidence_basis: GET /health returned {status: ok, ready: true} through tunnel

epistemic_flags: Quick tunnel URL is ephemeral — expires when cloudflared process on Debian stops. Not a production solution.
If tunnel URL changes before smoke test completes, a new tunnel-ready message will be needed.

action_gate.gate_note: Phase 4 smoke test unblocked. Set PSQ_ENDPOINT_URL and run wrangler dev.
